summary: Remove the dead localStorage cart item_id string field and document that the integer id is the menu-item id used for checkout.
reason: The localStorage cart shape had both id and item_id fields, but captured checkout validation showed the integer id is the value required by postmicmeshorder; keeping the unused string field made future mapping changes ambiguous.
validated_outcome: Build and vet passed. The request body remained byte-for-byte identical to the captured real checkout body, and PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 dry-run output was unchanged.
